steps.title: Identify the shape-focused goal
steps.content: The question asks the student to describe the wok's shape—its physical form. The notes provide two key characteristics: a “round, wide base” and “high, angled sides.”

steps.title: Match the shape information to the choices
steps.content: C directly answers by describing the wok's physical form: “a round, wide base and high, angled sides.” The other three instead emphasize the wok's history, its published book, or its cooking function. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
